reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). There are no flat work surfaces suitable for computer use, and the presence of a toilet, sink, books, mirror, basket, and white walls and floor make it unsuitable for focused solo work. The score reflects the lack of a dedicated workspace.
